headline: A Look At Cigna Group’s (CI) Valuation After Recent Share Price Gains
summary: What Cigna Group’s recent performance suggests for investors Cigna Group (CI) has drawn fresh attention after a recent move in its stock, with the price last closing at US$286.24. That level, combined with its recent returns, is prompting renewed scrutiny from investors. See our latest analysis for Cigna Group. The recent 1.5% one-day share price return, on top of a 4.2% one-month share price return, contrasts with a one-year total shareholder return that is down 7.5%. However, the three-year...
